items.title: Controlling Reasoning Effort in LLMs
items.core_innovation: Explains how models learn low/med/high reasoning effort modes
items.significance: Clarifies mechanism behind adjustable inference-time reasoning cost

items.title: PagedWeight: Efficient MoE LLM Serving with Dynamic Quality-Aware Weight Quantization
items.core_innovation: Runtime dynamic quantization balancing MoE weights vs KV cache
items.significance: Directly addresses MoE serving memory bottleneck at scale

items.title: QUADS: Stabilizing NVFP4 RL for MoE via Quantization-error Alignment
items.core_innovation: Fixes NVFP4 rollout collapse in MoE RL training
items.significance: Enables FP4-speed RL rollouts without training instability

items.title: PolyQ: Codesigning End-to-End Quantization for Edge CPU LLM Inference
items.core_innovation: Per-channel bit allocation compiler for CPU LLM inference
items.significance: Practical path to efficient on-device LLM inference on CPUs

items.title: ExaGEMM: CPU-Driven ML Inference via In-Register Low-Bit GEMM
items.core_innovation: Codesign framework for very-low-bit GEMM on CPUs
items.significance: Expands low-bit inference beyond GPU-only regimes

items.title: Understanding Reasoning from Pretraining to Post-Training
items.core_innovation: Controlled study linking pretraining choices to RL returns
items.significance: First rigorous link between pretraining scale/data and RL gains

items.title: Where Should RL Post-Training Compute Go?
items.core_innovation: Systematic study of compute allocation across size/search/feedback
items.significance: Actionable guidance for budgeting RL post-training compute

items.title: Stop Thinking, Start Looking: Reasoning-Free Alignment for Document QA
items.core_innovation: Perception-RFT skips verbose CoT for visual grounding tasks
items.significance: Cuts inference token cost while matching RL-reasoning accuracy

items.title: Bootstrapped Iterative Self-Reasoning Distillation for Compressed Reasoning
items.core_innovation: Fixes initialization bottleneck in self-distillation for CoT compression
items.significance: Improves practical reasoning-cost reduction via distillation

items.title: Leveraging Instruction Tuning and Merging for Reasoning Model Adaptation
items.core_innovation: Combines SFT and model merging for unverifiable-domain reasoning
items.significance: Extends RL-style reasoning gains to domains without verifiers

items.title: Model Routing Is Simple. Until It Isn't.
items.core_innovation: Practical pitfalls and design patterns for LLM routing systems
items.significance: Useful field guide as multi-model routing becomes standard

items.title: Kimi K3: 2.8T Open MoE Model with Kimi Delta Attention, 1M Context
items.core_innovation: Largest open-weight MoE model with novel attention variant
items.significance: Pushes open-weight frontier to trillion-scale, rivaling closed labs
